_comment: Tracks skill versions across devices. Hash is MD5 of SKILL.md source. Bootstrap protocol compares this against installed versions.

comms.changelog: Initial versioned release — moved to git-tracked skills in bhub

handoff.changelog: Added hc-strategy to clone block (11 repos); noted private repo restriction

dev-deploy.changelog: Added architecture preference: Vercel serverless over Firebase Cloud Functions for deploy simplicity

expert.changelog: Added Consequence Check & Red Team layer — auto-triggers adversarial audit on high-stakes recommendations via 3-lens evaluation (direct downside, coherence risk, unforeseeable surface area)

hc-strategy.changelog: Fix Eddy framing: async course is next product to launch (not deprioritized), 5 revenue streams in sequence
